# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-all-egress
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Egress

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: example-service.default.svc.cluster.local
spec:
  routes:
  - name: http-get
    match: http.method == "GET"
    retryBudget:
      maxRetries: 3
      utilizationLimit: 0.2

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-all-to-example-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: example-service
    namespace: default
  rules:
  - when:
    - header: "l5d-dst-override"
      regex: "example-service.default.svc.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd-inject
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-app
  namespace: linkerd-inject
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: example-container
        image: example-image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
